title: Podman network Ls having issue
body:
### Issue Description

In runner images we use the pester test 
```
It "podman networking" -TestCases "podman CNI plugins" {
        "podman network create -d bridge test-net" | Should -ReturnZeroExitCode
        "podman network ls" | Should -Not -OutputTextMatchingRegex "Error"
        "podman network rm test-net" | Should -ReturnZeroExitCode
    } 
```
```
failing  with error
[-] podman networking 339ms (334ms|5ms)
    azure-arm.build_image:    Expected regular expression 'Error' for 'podman network ls' command to not match 'time="2025-04-21T00:59:09Z" level=warning msg="Error validating CNI config file /etc/cni/net.d/87-podman-bridge.conflist: [failed to find plugin \"bridge\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"portmap\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"firewall\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"tuning\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin]]" time="2025-04-21T00:59:09Z" level=warning msg="Error validating CNI config file /etc/cni/net.d/test-net.conflist: [failed to find plugin \"bridge\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"portmap\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"firewall\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin] failed to find plugin \"tuning\" in path [/usr/local/libexec/cni /usr/libexec/cni /usr/local/lib/cni /usr/lib/cni /opt/cni/bin]]" NETWORK ID    NAME        VERSION     PLUGINS 2f259bab93aa  podman      0.4.0       bridge,portmap,firewall,tuning 254ddbe0ec1e  test-net    0.4.0       bridge,portmap,firewall,tuning,dnsname
    azure-arm.build_image:    ', but it did match.
    azure-arm.build_image:    at "podman network ls" | Should -Not -OutputTextMatchingRegex "Error", 
```


We need help in investigating the issue

comments.body: It does not look like your environment has the CNI plugins installed, hence the error. However, Podman deprecated CNI with 4.0 and removed support entirely for 5.0. Given we only provide support for the latest Podman version upstream this does not seem an appropriate issue for the upstream tracker; please retest with the latest Podman release or file a bug against your Linux distribution's bug tracker.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).
